command_log.command: mkdir -p .wheel/outputs/team-test && echo 'Team static test started' > .wheel/outputs/team-test/setup.txt && echo 'Setup complete'
echo "Workflow started. Hooks are now active." && echo "Run /wheel-status to check progress, /wheel-stop to deactivate."

command_log.command: echo '## Static Team Test Results' && echo '' && echo 'Summary:' && cat .wheel/outputs/team-test/summary.json 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.completed_count, .failed_count' && echo '' && echo 'Collected outputs:' && find .wheel/outputs/team-test/results/ -type f 2>/dev/null | sort
ls .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | while read sf; do echo "$(basename $sf): $(jq -r '.workflow_name' "$sf" 2>/dev/null)"; done

for sf in .wheel/state_a1f20d6ada6d3234f.json .wheel/state_a5ee8cb47303012da.json .wheel/state_a5fabfb6f50a1d82f.json; do echo "=== $(basename $sf) ===" && jq '{cursor, status, steps: [.steps[] | {id, type, status}]}' "$sf"; done
